zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Erskine Of Mar於1249年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，他的父親John Erskine32歲，母親Jane Hatcher of Aberdeen32歲。他於1270年與Margaret Macgilronan在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1296年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Erskine Of Mar was born in 1249, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, John Erskine, was 32 and his mother, Jane Hatcher of Aberdeen, was 32. He married Margaret Macgilronan in 1270, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1296, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Erskine Of Mar est né en 1249, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, John Erskine, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jane Hatcher of Aberdeen, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Macgilronan en 1270, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1296, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

Er hat 1270 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland Margaret Macgilronan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1296 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Erskine Of Mar è nato il nel 1249 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Erskine, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Jane Hatcher of Aberdeen, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Macgilronan nel 1270, nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1296, nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ko.Carrick, Argyle, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 카릭
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Erskine Of Mar(이)가 1249년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Erskine(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Hatcher of Aberdeen(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1270년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 Margaret Macgilronan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Macgilronan em 1270, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.Carrick, Argyle, Scotland: каррикк, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Erskine Of Mar родился в 1249 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Erskine было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Hatcher of Aberdeen, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Macgilronan в 1270 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1296 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

Se casó con Margaret Macgilronan en 1270, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas.
